# Netify Agent v5 AI Documentation

> Machine-readable specifications and AI-optimized documentation for version 5 of the Netify DPI Agent.

## Processor Plugins
- [Aggregator Processor](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-proc-aggregator.md)
- [Core Processor](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-proc-core.md)
- [Device Discovery Processor](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-proc-dev-discovery.md)
- [Lua Processor](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-proc-lua.md)
- [Python Processor](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-proc-python.md)

## Sink Plugins
- [HTTP Sink](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-sink-http.md)
- [Log Sink](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-sink-log.md)
- [MQTT Sink](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-sink-mqtt.md)
- [Socket Sink](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-sink-socket.md)
- [ubus Sink](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-sink-ubus.md)

## Telemetry
- [Agent Status](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-agent-status.md)
- [Endpoints](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-endpoints.md)
- [Flow](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-flow.md)
- [Flow Actions](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-flow-actions.md)
- [Flow Purge](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-flow-purge.md)
- [Flow Stats](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-flow-stats.md)
- [Intelligence](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-intelligence.md)
- [Interfaces](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-interfaces.md)
- [Interface Stats](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/docs/netify-telemetry-interface-stats.md)

## Configuration Schemas
- [Overlay](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-agent-overlay.json)
- [Proc Aggregator](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-aggregator.json)
- [Proc Core](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-core.json)
- [Proc Device Discovery](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-dev-discovery.json)
- [Proc Flow Actions](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-flow-actions.json)
- [Proc Intelligence](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-intel.json)
- [Proc Lua](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-lua.json)
- [Proc Python](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-proc-python.json)
- [Sink HTTP](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-sink-http.json)
- [Sink Log](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-sink-log.json)
- [Sink MQTT](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-sink-mqtt.json)
- [Sink Socket](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-sink-socket.json)
- [Sink ubus](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-sink-ubus.json)

## Telemetry Schemas
- [Agent Status](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-agent-status.json)
- [Endpoints](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-endpoints.json)
- [Flow](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-flow.json)
- [Flow Purge](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-flow-purge.json)
- [Flow Stats](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-flow-stats.json)
- [Intelligence](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-intelligence.json)
- [Interfaces](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-interfaces.json)
- [Interface Stats](https://netify-ai.github.io/agent-docs/v5/schemas/netify-telemetry-interface-stats.json)
